自太阳再次升起的那刻起，混沌的欢愉将注定无所遁形。
***“我会找到他的，无论他藏到宇宙中哪一个角落，我终会找到他的。”***

凯蒂古拉周身的火焰嗡鸣着升腾爆起，
在灼热的疯狂下，漆黑的腥臭恶意顷刻便燃烧殆尽——
***“当我找到他时，我会把这世间一切的欢悦和欣愉，都拖进炼狱中焚烧。”***

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

When sun’s fires rekindle, wicked bliss of chaos will have nowhere to hide.
***“I’ll find Him. Doesn’t matter where in this rotten universe He’s hiding, that filthy rat’s gonna pay.”***

Fires of Kathigu-Ra hummed and surged. In a searing, primal madness, the inky, stinking malice of the Aeon of Rupture was incinerated in an instant—
***“When I find Him, I will drag every bit of His glee and triumph in this world into my eternal inferno, and watch it all burn.”   ***

embeds.title: Out of the Aeons
embeds.description: "Out of the Aeons" is a short story by American writers H. P. Lovecraft and Hazel Heald, a writer from Somerville, Massachusetts. First published in the April 1935 issue of Weird Tales magazine, it was one of five stories Lovecraft revised for Heald. It focuses on a Boston museum that displays an an

Often times I found they had to like. Trim down the translation in other games
Playing in Chinese helps
